      - name: Commit state
        if: success()
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git pull --rebase origin main || true
          git add tools/social/config/content-library.json 2>/dev/null || true
          if git diff --staged --quiet; then echo "No changes"; else
            git commit -m "auto: video generated $(date -u +%Y-%m-%d) [skip ci]"
            git pull --rebase origin main || true
            git push || echo "Push failed, will retry next run"
          fi
